entries.title: Santander’s Getnet Plugs Merchants Into Agentic Commerce
entries.summary: Getnet, Santander’s global merchant payments platform, now enables merchants to accept payments initiated by artificial intelligence (AI) agents. The company’s new infrastructure can handle payments initiated by merchants’ own AI agents or by those operating through conversational platforms, Getnet said in a Tuesday (June 9) press release. Getnet’s solution is built on open standards; is designed

entries.title: Nvidia Ships the Foundation Model Physical AI Has Been Waiting For
entries.summary: Chatbots needed large language models to learn from text at scale. Robots, self-driving cars and industrial machines need something different. Nvidia just released the most advanced version of it yet. Nvidia launched Cosmos 3, an open world foundation model for physical AI trained on 20 trillion tokens of multimodal data — including nearly a […] The post Nvidia Ships the Foundation Model Phy

entries.title: Nissan Turns Factory AI Into a Comeback Strategy
entries.summary: Nissan is deploying artificial intelligence simultaneously inside its factories to cut production downtime and worker injuries, as well as inside its vehicles to reach autonomous driving at scale. The company bets that AI infrastructure is the fastest path back to growth. At its Canton, Mississippi, plant, which employs 3,200 workers and builds the Frontier […] The post Nissan Turns Factory

entries.title: Earlytrade Raises $25 Million to Bring Agentic AI to Construction Sector
entries.summary: Construction industry working capital management platform Earlytrade said it has raised $25 million in total funding. The company made this announcement Tuesday (June 9) following its Series A round, saying it was using its capital to expand in the U.S. and add agentic artificial intelligence (AI) into its marketplace infrastructure. Founded in Australia but […] The post Earlytrade Raises $2

entries.title: ICE launches AI-powered fixed income pre-trade analytics for buyside investors
entries.summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), one of the world's leading providers of financial market technology and data powering global capital markets, today announced the launch of ICE Compass, an AI-powered trading analytics platform that gives buy-side fixed income trading desks prioritized trader counterparty rankings and price estimates before executing trades.

entries.title: ING deploys agentic AI to speed up mortgage decisions
entries.summary: ING has introduced agentic AI to speed up mortgage applications in the Netherlands.

entries.title: NYDFS proposes stablecoin regulatory framework
entries.summary: New York State Department of Financial Services (DFS) Acting Superintendent Kaitlin Asrow today announced a proposed regulation to build on New York’s first-in-the-nation stablecoin framework in accordance with federal regulations under the GENIUS Act.

entries.title: Klarna launches savings account in US
entries.summary: Klarna, the global digital bank and flexible payments provider, today announced the launch of Klarna Savings accounts in the U.S. - FDIC-insured accounts with no minimum deposit, no monthly fees, direct deposit, and interest rates above 3% APY¹, available directly in the Klarna app and provided and held by WebBank, member FDIC.

entries.title: Santander's Getnet helps businesses accept agent-initiated payments
entries.summary: Getnet, Santander’s global merchant payments platform, continues to advance its agentic commerce strategy with the launch of new artificial intelligence-powered capabilities that enable merchants to securely and efficiently accept payments initiated by AI agents.

entries.title: Members First Credit Union picks Mahalo Banking for digital revamp
entries.summary: Members First Credit Union (‘Members First’) has selected Mahalo Banking’s Thoughtful Banking® platform as part of a broader technology modernization initiative to deliver a more flexible, intuitive, and future-ready digital banking experience for its members.

entries.title: 3forge unveils application fabric for finance
entries.summary: 3forge, whose real-time application engine is used by leading buy-side and sell-side financial institutions to support mission-critical workflows, today introduced 3forge Enterprise, an application fabric for finance built on more than 12 years of real-time financial infrastructure deployments.

entries.title: Volante debuts Agentic AI core
entries.summary: Volante Technologies, the global leader in Payments as a Service (PaaS), today announced that its Payments Platform and PaaS operations are now powered by its “Vol360i” Agentic AI.

entries.title: K2 Integrity acquires RiskFront
entries.summary: K2 Integrity, a global leader in risk management, investigations, and assurance services, today announced the acquisition of RiskFront AI, an innovative developer and provider of agentic AI systems to automate financial crime compliance and risk operations.

entries.title: Alma Bank transitions to Narmi
entries.summary: Narmi, a leading provider of digital banking solutions for financial institutions, today announced its partnership with Alma Bank, a community-focused financial institution based in Long Island City, New York City.

entries.title: Feezai opens fraud intelligence network
entries.summary: Feedzai, the global leader in AI-native financial crime prevention, today announced the availability of Feedzai IQ Score, an AI-native, network-derived fraud risk scoring solution for banks of all sizes.

entries.title: Vine rolls out reporting dashboard
entries.summary: Vine, a commercial and agriculture lending accelerator for banks and credit unions, today announced the launch of its new Reporting Dashboard, an AI-powered, configurable feature designed to give financial institutions greater visibility into loan portfolio performance, risk exposure and profitability.

entries.title: AI-native banking platform Titan secures $3 million in new funding
entries.summary: Titan, the first of its kind, banking‑native AI platform purpose‑built for financial services, today announced it has raised $3 million in new funding, led by Entropy Ventures.

entries.title: Hey Savi and PayPal launch agentic commerce platform with in-app checkout
entries.summary: PayPal has teamed up with online fashion search outfit Hey Savi to launch what they claim is the UK's first agentic commerce platform with in-app checkout.

entries.title: Court approves Visa-Mastercard settlement
entries.summary: A federal judge ruled Tuesday that a settlement between the card networks and 12 million merchants over card-swipe fees is fair and reasonable.

entries.title: Nuvei in 'advanced' talks over $2.7bn Payoneer acquisition - Reuters
entries.summary: Canada's Nuvei is in advanced talks to buy cross-border payments firm Payoneer in a $2.7 billion deal, according to Reuters.

entries.title: Vinyl raises $20m to modernise IPO Infrastructure
entries.summary: Vinyl Equity has raised $20 million in Series A funding to modernise the technology infrastructure for company for capital markets and corporate transactions.

entries.title: Klarna dives deeper into banking
entries.summary: The buy now, pay later provider is debuting a savings account to lure more people away from banks and into its ecosystem.
